# peer-support.live

> Interactive Python tutorial for psychology students at Maastricht University — 29 lessons, runs entirely in the browser with no setup required.

## Summary

An educational resource covering Python fundamentals through the lens of psychology research: EEG data, reaction times, statistical testing, and data visualisation. Built for SICT Year 2 students at the Faculty of Psychology and Neuroscience. Uses Pyodide for in-browser code execution — no installation or account needed.

## Topics

- Python basics: variables, loops, functions, data structures
- Exception handling and debugging
- Working with real psychology research data (EEG signals, behavioural experiments)
- Data analysis with Pandas and scipy
- Data visualisation with Matplotlib
- Regular expressions for text processing
- Interactive exercises with immediate feedback

## Key page

https://peer-support.live/

## Provider

SICT Support Team
Faculty of Psychology and Neuroscience
Maastricht University
Contact: tweak.39cloudy@icloud.com
